top_signals.title: Lagarde Says ECB Has Started to See Second Round Effects
top_signals.summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde said high energy prices are starting to feed through to other parts of the economy, according to an interview with France Culture.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: LNG Tanker Heads for Hormuz Amid News of Reopening
top_signals.summary: A liquefied natural gas tanker has headed for the Strait of Hormuz, following an announcement by President Trump that he had struck a deal with Iran for the reopening of the chokepoint. Itan confirmed the preliminary agreement. The agreement is scheduled to be signed on Friday, with details yet to be revealed. There will also be a 60-day ceasefire period until negotiations are completed on all conditions of the end of the war. Iran has demanded and received commitment for an end to the war in Lebanon, an unfreeze of oil funds frozen by the U.S.…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Elliott Said to Take Almost 5% Stake in UK Distributor Bunzl
top_signals.summary: Activist investor Elliott Investment Management LP has taken an almost 5% stake in Bunzl Plc, according to people familiar with the matter, after a profit warning last year sent the UK distributor’s shares tumbling.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Razorpay Confidentially Files for $500 Million India IPO
top_signals.summary: Payments firm Razorpay Software Ltd. has confidentially filed draft papers with the Securities and Exchange Board of India for an initial public offering, according to a newspaper advertisement, joining a growing list of Indian startups opting for the confidential route.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Singapore to Start Gold Clearing With JPMorgan, Others
top_signals.summary: Singapore plans to launch a gold-clearing system this year, with banks including JPMorgan Chase & Co. and Deutsche Bank AG set to participate in the city-state’s push to become a hub in the global bullion market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Macron’s G7 legacy hangs on fickle AI funding and data centers
top_signals.summary: The French president is positioning France as Europe's AI powerhouse by leveraging on the nation's abundant supply of nuclear energy for data centers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The U.S.-Iran peace deal will give the markets some 'breathing space', says HSBC's Willem Sels - CNBC
top_signals.summary: The U.S.-Iran peace deal will give the markets some 'breathing space', says HSBC's Willem Sels  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
